channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Camberwell Green SE5, south west entrance. Tag and stickering on duo bin., 24th May
item.description:
Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell Green, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere again, 24th May
item.description:
Please send street cleaners more regularly. The council are aware this is a hot-spot Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ruston Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 24th May
item.description:
Fly tipping as usual in this spot. Hoping for a longer term solution than just reporting it. Thanks team!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London

item.title: Denmark Hill SE5, junction with Coldharbour Lane. Flyposting affixed to signage column., 24th May
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 88, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: A lot of weeds around phone box on surrounding area.., 24th May
item.description:
….starting to look very unkempt and untidy. Please arrange tidy up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sinclairs Cottages, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anti Social Behaviour in Havelock Recreation Ground, 24th May
item.description:
Meeting of groups of individuals who play music and are noisy late into the night. Have BBQs and then leave the mess behind and through rubbish into gardens adjoining the rec. This needs to be nipped in the bud before it becomes a continuous issue in the summer months. Perhaps a restriction after 9pm on groups of people.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mornington Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in Wellington Gardens, 24th May
item.description:
Between 36 snd 40
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish over pavement, 24th May
item.description:
Rubbish dumped and all over pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powerscroft Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree causing pavement damage and property issues, 24th May
item.description:
Tree roots are damaging the pavement. Leaves are blocking gutters/rooflights on nearby properties. Please inspect and consider reducing the tree height (crown reduction), not removal.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over pavement and abandoned mattress, 24th May
item.description:
As seen in photo at corner of Majendie and Brewery Roads.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue brain still in front of British Heart Fndn, 24th May
item.description:
I previously reported this, and you said it was taken care of in mid-April. However, it is still here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seven Sisters Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No Forest on Datchelor Place, 24th May
item.description:
Remove it now please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Datchelor Place, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bed base, 24th May
item.description:
Flytipping outside our house. Bed base abandoned outside 22 Glenfarg Rd house on 24/05/26

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glenfarg Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car blocking residential parking, 24th May
item.description:
Hi, this car has been abandoned here for more than two months. It has broken down and nobody has ever been seen around. This is where usually residents of sycamore grove park, and it's unclear if it has actually broken down or was stolen and abandoned.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rowan Terrace, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracked risen pavement, 24th May
item.description:
Has been cracked for month but it has risen up now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37A, Friern Barnet Lane, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 121 Broadhurst Gardens, 24th May
item.description:
This is a continuation of the issues reported under 9247076, 8480037 and 8764975. The kerbstones outside 121 Broadhurst Gardens remain broken. The broken kerbstones are on the pavement and in the road. This is a health and safety hazard that needs to be fixed promptly. The stones at the end of the pavement/road outside 121 Broadhurst Gardens require repair and replacement. There are two sections where the kerbstones are missing. There are also a number of loose kerbstones on the pavement and road. They are a tripping hazard on the pavement and a hazard to car tyres on the road. This needs to be fixed promptly as the issue has now been ongoing for over a year. Despite repeated messages (and three previous reports being closed) the issue has not been rectified. It is dangerous. I have tried to upload photos but Camden's system is not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 121, Broadhurst Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes blocking pavement on Rye Lane, 24th May
item.description:
Dozens of Lime bikes are completely blocking the pavement near Nags Head Peckham 231 Rye Ln, making it impossible for pedestrians to cross safely. Vulnerable users, including people with prams and wheelchair users, are being forced to walk dangerously in the main road (as pictured). Please send an enforcement team to clear the obstruction and fine the operator immediately.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 200, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car park never cleaned, 24th May
item.description:
This car park is never cleaned hence beer bottles and rubbish everywhere. This does not take into account the other side of the car park where general rubbish is piled up which has already been reported by my neighbour and is impacting the entrance to where we live. Foxes and rats are a problem because of this and we have to pay to clear up the spillage overflowing onto our entrance. The car park owners need to be made to clean it up and should be ashamed of themselves. This has been going on since they became owners and there is no information who to report this to.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abery Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole, 24th May
item.description:
The tar in this are has sunken leaving a hole where the pavement meets the boundary of the house (37a) Friern Barnet lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Friern Barnet Lane, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
